name: Spec Analysis
description: Standard workflow for analyzing a hardware specification topic

tasks.content: Mapped spec structure for relevant sections
tasks.detail: Call spec_navigate(spec, 'root') then navigate to the relevant chapter. Identify all sections to analyze.
Use spec_search + spec_navigate. Quote verbatim. Record section numbers. Never answer from memory.
Check for normative references, related registers, and dependent sections.
Structured summary: section references, verbatim quotes, conclusions, open questions.
